task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "使用PowerShell或find命令全盘搜索mp3文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "优先检查常见文件夹（下载、音乐、桌面等）"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "使用Everything或Spotlight等可视化工具搜索mp3文件"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "筛选文件大小和修改时间以定位目标文件"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "用播放器检查音频比特率和播放效果"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "检查云存储中是否有目标文件"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "使用数据恢复软件扫描丢失文件"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "尝试从邮件或聊天记录重新下载文件"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "导入MP3到剪映/必剪并启用字幕识别功能"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "导出字幕文件为TXT或SRT格式"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "安装faster-whisper和gradio库"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "加载WhisperModel并运行语音转文字接口"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "上传MP3至网易见外工作台并选择语音转写"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "调用腾讯云语音识别API并解析返回结果"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "在Android设备上使用Google录音机App生成文字"}, {"id": "Node16", "description": "在iOS设备上使用讯飞听见App生成文字"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node4", "type": "filterResults"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node4", "type": "filterResults"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "filterResults"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "validateAudioQuality"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node5", "type": "validateAudioQuality"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node5", "type": "validateAudioQuality"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node5", "type": "validateAudioQuality"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "exportSubtitleFile"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "loadModelAndRunTranscription"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node10", "type": "exportSubtitleFile"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node10", "type": "exportSubtitleFile"}, {"source": "Node15", "target": "Node10", "type": "exportSubtitleFile"}, {"source": "Node16", "target": "Node10", "type": "exportSubtitleFile"}]}
